behavior_summary: Provides the object's response when the player examines or 'looks' at it: emits a short descriptive bark 'mushroom' and then suspends/exits the U8P_MUSHCAP::look process.
No branching, no global flag reads/writes, and no external calls are made; the behavior is a single-shot descriptive response.
notable_control_flow: U8P_MUSHCAP::look (process 0x0208) executes when the engine invokes the object's U8P_MUSHCAP::look/examine handler.
Within U8P_MUSHCAP::look the script issues a Bark with the text 'mushroom' and then immediately suspends/exits the process.
There are no conditional branches, menus, or subsequent actions in the flow.
open_questions: Are there any context-sensitive variants (e.g., different U8P_MUSHCAP::look texts under certain global flags) defined elsewhere for this object? The local script shows none.
Is the object instance removed or changed by other game systems after U8P_MUSHCAP::look/examine? Not indicated here.

main_function.name: U8P_MUSHCAP::look
main_function.purpose: Handle the player's U8P_MUSHCAP::look/examine action for this object by showing a short descriptive text ('mushroom') and then suspending the process.
entry_conditions: Triggered when the player uses the 'U8P_MUSHCAP::look' or examine action on the object (process type 0x0208).

function_map.name: U8P_MUSHCAP::look
function_map.role: Respond to U8P_MUSHCAP::look/examine by showing a single descriptive bark
